question: Có bao nhiêu user mới tháng này?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_users FROM user_service."Users" u WHERE u."CreatedAt" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND NOT u."IsDeleted";

question: Doanh thu theo tháng năm nay
gold_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) AS month, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: Top 5 sự kiện bán nhiều vé nhất
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(t.id) AS sold FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY sold DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Tỉ lệ vé đã check-in của các sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.is_checked_in) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS checkin_ratio FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY checkin_ratio DESC;

question: Sự kiện nào có doanh thu cao nhất tuần qua
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Tổng ghế đã bán theo từng sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) AS sold_seats FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN seat_service.seat_maps sm ON sm.session_id = s.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id WHERE st.status = 'Sold' GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY sold_seats DESC;

question: Org nào doanh thu cao nhất quý này
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Số lượng lời mời tham gia mỗi org
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", COUNT(i."Id") AS invitations FROM org_service."Organizations" org LEFT JOIN org_service."Invitations" i ON i."OrganizationId" = org."Id" GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY invitations DESC;

question: Sự kiện đang chờ duyệt
gold_sql: SELECT e.id, e.name FROM event_service.events e WHERE e.status = 1 AND NOT e.is_deleted;

question: Khách hàng chi tiêu nhiều nhất top 10
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", SUM(o.total_amount) AS spend FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Phí platform đã thu trong tháng này
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(o.platform_fee) AS fees FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND o.paid_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);

question: Tỉ lệ ghế VIP đã bán
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS vip_sold_ratio FROM seat_service.seats st JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.id = st.legend_id WHERE l.name = 'VIP';

question: So sánh doanh thu Q1 vs Q2 năm nay
gold_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.paid_at) AS quarter, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.paid_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.paid_at) IN (1, 2) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

question: Sự kiện có nhiều session nhất
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(s.id) AS n_sessions FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY n_sessions DESC LIMIT 1;

question: User bị ban gần đây
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", b."Reason", b."CreatedAt" FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN user_service."BanHistories" b ON b."UserId" = u."Id" ORDER BY b."CreatedAt" DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Số sơ đồ ghế template chưa được publish
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS unpublished_templates FROM seat_service.seat_maps WHERE session_id IS NULL AND status <> 'Published';

question: Doanh thu trung bình mỗi vé
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(t.id), 0) AS avg_per_ticket FROM payment_service.orders o JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid';

question: Legend nào được dùng nhiều nhất trong các sơ đồ ghế
gold_sql: SELECT l.name, COUNT(st.id) AS usage FROM event_service.legends l JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.legend_id = l.id GROUP BY l.name ORDER BY usage DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Org nào chưa connect Stripe
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name" FROM org_service."Organizations" org WHERE org."PaymentStatus" = 0 AND NOT org."IsDeleted";

question: Số order Failed trong tuần qua
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_orders FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Failed' AND o.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days';

question: Top 10 khách hàng mua ghế VIP chi tiêu cao nhất
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", SUM(oi.price) AS vip_spend FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" JOIN payment_service.order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.id = oi.seat_id JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.id = st.legend_id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND l.name = 'VIP' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY vip_spend DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Doanh thu và phí platform theo từng sự kiện của mỗi tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name" AS org_name, e.name AS event_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS gross, SUM(o.platform_fee) AS fees FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN event_service.events e ON e.organization_id = org."Id" JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name", e.id, e.name ORDER BY gross DESC;

question: Sự kiện nào có chủ tổ chức đã bị ban
gold_sql: SELECT e.name AS event_name, u."Username" AS owner, b."Reason" FROM event_service.events e JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = e.organization_id JOIN user_service."Users" u ON u."Id" = org."OwnerId" JOIN user_service."BanHistories" b ON b."UserId" = u."Id";

question: Tổng số tổ chức trên hệ thống
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orgs FROM org_service."Organizations" WHERE NOT "IsDeleted";

question: Số sự kiện đã publish
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS published FROM event_service.events WHERE status = 4 AND NOT is_deleted;

question: Số ghế còn trống
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS available_seats FROM seat_service.seats WHERE status = 'Available';

question: Tổng số vé đã phát hành
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS tickets FROM event_service.tickets;

question: Số đơn hàng theo trạng thái
gold_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM payment_service.orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC;

question: Số user đang bị ban
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS banned FROM user_service."Users" WHERE "IsBanned" = TRUE;

question: Số sự kiện theo từng trạng thái
gold_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM event_service.events GROUP BY status ORDER BY status;

question: Số ghế theo từng loại ghế
gold_sql: SELECT seat_type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM seat_service.seats GROUP BY seat_type ORDER BY seat_type;

question: Số lời mời theo trạng thái
gold_sql: SELECT "Status", COUNT(*) AS n FROM org_service."Invitations" GROUP BY "Status" ORDER BY "Status";

question: Tổng doanh thu toàn hệ thống
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS revenue FROM payment_service.orders WHERE status = 'Paid';

question: Tổng số session đã tạo
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS sessions FROM event_service.sessions WHERE NOT is_deleted;

question: Mức phí hiện tại của nền tảng
gold_sql: SELECT "CurrentFeeRate" FROM org_service."PlatformConfigs" ORDER BY "Id" LIMIT 1;

question: Số tổ chức đã kết nối Stripe
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active FROM org_service."Organizations" WHERE "PaymentStatus" = 2;

question: Số vé đã check-in
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS checked_in FROM event_service.tickets WHERE is_checked_in = TRUE;

question: Số sơ đồ ghế đã publish
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS published_maps FROM seat_service.seat_maps WHERE status = 'Published';

question: Giá vé trung bình trên toàn bộ loại vé
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM event_service.legends;

question: Số đơn hàng đã thanh toán hôm nay
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS paid_today FROM payment_service.orders WHERE status = 'Paid' AND paid_at >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE);

question: Doanh thu theo từng tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC;

question: Số vé bán theo từng sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(t.id) AS tickets FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY tickets DESC;

question: Top 10 sự kiện doanh thu cao nhất
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Số ghế đã bán theo từng tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT sm.organization_id, COUNT(*) AS sold FROM seat_service.seat_maps sm JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id WHERE st.status = 'Sold' GROUP BY sm.organization_id ORDER BY sold DESC;

question: Doanh thu theo từng loại vé
gold_sql: SELECT oi.legend_name, SUM(oi.price) AS revenue FROM payment_service.order_items oi JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY oi.legend_name ORDER BY revenue DESC;

question: Số đơn hàng của mỗi khách hàng
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", COUNT(o.id) AS orders FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY orders DESC;

question: Số sự kiện của mỗi tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", COUNT(e.id) AS events FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN event_service.events e ON e.organization_id = org."Id" GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY events DESC;

question: Tỉ lệ ghế đã bán của mỗi sơ đồ ghế
gold_sql: SELECT seat_map_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS sold_ratio FROM seat_service.seats GROUP BY seat_map_id ORDER BY sold_ratio DESC;

question: Giá trị đơn hàng trung bình theo tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY avg_order DESC;

question: Số vé check-in theo từng sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.is_checked_in) AS checked_in FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY checked_in DESC;

question: Top 5 khách hàng có nhiều đơn nhất
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", COUNT(o.id) AS orders FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY orders DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Tổng số ghế của mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(st.id) AS seats FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN seat_service.seat_maps sm ON sm.session_id = s.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY seats DESC;

question: Doanh thu theo tỉnh thành
gold_sql: SELECT e.province_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY e.province_name ORDER BY revenue DESC;

question: Số session của mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(s.id) AS sessions FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY sessions DESC;

question: Tổng phí nền tảng thu được theo tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", SUM(o.platform_fee) AS fees FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY fees DESC;

question: Số loại vé của mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(l.id) AS legends FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.event_id = e.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY legends DESC;

question: Số đơn hàng thất bại theo tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", COUNT(o.id) AS failed FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Failed' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY failed DESC;

question: Doanh thu theo tháng của từng tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) AS month, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name", 2 ORDER BY org."Name", month;

question: Số khách hàng duy nhất đã mua vé mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS buyers FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY buyers DESC;

question: Giá vé cao nhất của mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, MAX(l.price) AS max_price FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.event_id = e.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY max_price DESC;

question: Số ghế VIP của mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(st.id) AS vip_seats FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN seat_service.seat_maps sm ON sm.session_id = s.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.id = st.legend_id WHERE l.name = 'VIP' GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY vip_seats DESC;

question: Tỉ lệ đơn đã thanh toán trên tổng đơn theo tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Paid') * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS paid_ratio FROM payment_service.orders GROUP BY org_id ORDER BY paid_ratio DESC;

question: Số thành viên là designer của mỗi tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", COUNT(m."Id") AS designers FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN org_service."Permissions" p ON p."OrganizationId" = org."Id" AND p."IsDesigner" JOIN org_service."Members" m ON m."PermissionId" = p."Id" GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY designers DESC;

question: Top 3 loại vé doanh thu cao nhất của mỗi sự kiện
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT e.name AS event_name, oi.legend_name, SUM(oi.price) AS revenue, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.id ORDER BY SUM(oi.price) DESC) AS rk FROM payment_service.order_items oi JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id AND o.status = 'Paid' JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.id = o.session_id JOIN event_service.events e ON e.id = s.event_id GROUP BY e.id, e.name, oi.legend_name) r WHERE rk <= 3 ORDER BY event_name, rk;

question: Sự kiện có doanh thu vượt mức trung bình
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY e.id, e.name HAVING SUM(o.total_amount) > (SELECT AVG(ev_rev) FROM (SELECT SUM(o2.total_amount) AS ev_rev FROM event_service.sessions s2 JOIN payment_service.orders o2 ON o2.session_id = s2.id WHERE o2.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY s2.event_id) x) ORDER BY revenue DESC;

question: Khách hàng quay lại mua nhiều lần
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", COUNT(o.id) AS orders FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 1 ORDER BY orders DESC;

question: Tỉ lệ check-in của mỗi session
gold_sql: SELECT s.name, CASE WHEN COUNT(t.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.is_checked_in) * 1.0 / COUNT(t.id) END AS checkin_ratio FROM event_service.sessions s JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY checkin_ratio DESC;

question: So sánh doanh thu tháng này với tháng trước theo tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT o.org_id, SUM(o.total_amount) FILTER (WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS this_month, SUM(o.total_amount) FILTER (WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', o.paid_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')) AS last_month FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY o.org_id ORDER BY this_month DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Top 5 tổ chức theo doanh thu kèm phần trăm đóng góp
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(o.total_amount)) OVER () AS pct FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Sự kiện chưa bán được vé nào
gold_sql: SELECT e.id, e.name FROM event_service.events e WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM event_service.sessions s JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id WHERE s.event_id = e.id);

question: Khách hàng chi tiêu trên mức trung bình
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", SUM(o.total_amount) AS spend FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" HAVING SUM(o.total_amount) > (SELECT AVG(s) FROM (SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS s FROM payment_service.orders WHERE status = 'Paid' GROUP BY user_id) t) ORDER BY spend DESC;

question: Xếp hạng sự kiện theo vé bán trong từng tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT e.organization_id, e.name, COUNT(t.id) AS sold, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.organization_id ORDER BY COUNT(t.id) DESC) AS rk FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.organization_id, e.id, e.name) r WHERE rk = 1 ORDER BY sold DESC;

question: Sự kiện có tỉ lệ lấp đầy ghế trên 20%
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS fill_rate FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN seat_service.seat_maps sm ON sm.session_id = s.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.status = 'Sold') * 1.0 / COUNT(*) > 0.2 ORDER BY fill_rate DESC;

question: Doanh thu lũy kế theo tháng
gold_sql: SELECT m, rev, SUM(rev) OVER (ORDER BY m) AS cumulative FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at) AS m, SUM(total_amount) AS rev FROM payment_service.orders WHERE status = 'Paid' GROUP BY 1) t ORDER BY m;

question: Sự kiện có hơn 3 vé đã check-in
gold_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.is_checked_in) AS checked_in FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.is_checked_in) > 3 ORDER BY checked_in DESC;

question: Loại vé phổ biến nhất trong từng tổ chức
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT sm.organization_id, l.name, COUNT(st.id) AS n, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sm.organization_id ORDER BY COUNT(st.id) DESC) AS rk FROM seat_service.seat_maps sm JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.id = st.legend_id GROUP BY sm.organization_id, l.name) r WHERE rk = 1 ORDER BY n DESC;

question: Báo cáo doanh thu và phí theo tổ chức kèm số ghế đã bán
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.platform_fee) AS fees, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_service.seat_maps sm JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id WHERE sm.organization_id = org."Id" AND st.status = 'Sold') AS sold_seats FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.org_id = org."Id" WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC;

question: Khách hàng mua vé ở nhiều sự kiện nhất
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", COUNT(DISTINCT s.event_id) AS events FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.id = o.session_id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Top khách hàng mua ghế VIP nhiều nhất
gold_sql: SELECT u."Username", COUNT(*) AS vip_tickets FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" JOIN payment_service.order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.id = oi.seat_id JOIN event_service.legends l ON l.id = st.legend_id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' AND l.name = 'VIP' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username" ORDER BY vip_tickets DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Doanh thu mỗi tổ chức kèm số sự kiện và số vé bán
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS events, COUNT(t.id) AS tickets, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org JOIN event_service.events e ON e.organization_id = org."Id" JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id LEFT JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.id = t.order_id AND o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY org."Id", org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC;

question: Tổ chức mà mỗi khách hàng chi tiêu nhiều nhất
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT u."Username", org."Name" AS org_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS spend, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY u."Id" ORDER BY SUM(o.total_amount) DESC) AS rk FROM user_service."Users" u JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.user_id = u."Id" JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = o.org_id WHERE o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY u."Id", u."Username", org."Id", org."Name") r WHERE rk = 1 ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 20;

question: Top 10 sự kiện theo doanh thu kèm tên tổ chức và số ghế đã bán
gold_sql: SELECT e.name AS event_name, org."Name" AS org_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_service.seat_maps sm JOIN seat_service.seats st ON st.seat_map_id = sm.id WHERE sm.event_id = e.id AND st.status = 'Sold') AS sold_seats FROM event_service.events e JOIN org_service."Organizations" org ON org."Id" = e.organization_id JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN payment_service.orders o ON o.session_id = s.id AND o.status = 'Paid' GROUP BY e.id, e.name, org."Name" ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Toàn cảnh mỗi tổ chức: số sự kiện, số vé bán, doanh thu
gold_sql: SELECT org."Name", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_service.events e WHERE e.organization_id = org."Id") AS events, (SELECT COUNT(t.id) FROM event_service.events e JOIN event_service.sessions s ON s.event_id = e.id JOIN event_service.tickets t ON t.session_id = s.id WHERE e.organization_id = org."Id") AS tickets, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM payment_service.orders o WHERE o.org_id = org."Id" AND o.status = 'Paid'), 0) AS revenue FROM org_service."Organizations" org ORDER BY revenue DESC;
